justification.what: Hetzner cpx31 x86 (4vCPU/8GB/160GB) in ash running idea-nexus stack.
justification.why: Migrate Nexus from Vultr per lift-and-ship hard-gate; consolidate dogfood to Hetzner.
justification.who: Operator directive 2026-04-21 PM; agent executed backup + restore + DNS flip + Vultr destroy.
justification.how_helps: Full Hetzner dogfood stack at 29.98 EUR/mo vs prior ~120 USD/mo Vultr; 73% cost reduction.
justification.expected_return: ~88 USD/mo saved, ~1050 USD/yr; funds LiteLLM/GrowthBook/Drata onboarding.
